purpose: Seamless square biome transition floor tile source image for dungeon map baking

tileability_requirements: left and right edges must align as a continuous pattern
top and bottom edges must align as a continuous pattern
global_style_rules.intended_use: transition tile between two biome floor families
global_style_rules.fidelity_target: must visually match both connected biome tiles

transition_surface_rules.secondary_intrusion_material: soft fungal growth and spore dust
blending_behavior: fungal material should creep into cracks and seams first
stone should remain readable as the structural base
transition should feel natural and gradual

pattern_structure.base_pattern: large worn flagstones with localized fungal encroachment
pattern_structure.scale: large readable blocks with subtle organic intrusion

micro_details: hairline cracks with spore dust in seams

output_notes.generator_instruction: Treat this full JSON as the image prompt. Prioritize seamless blending between the two biome identities while remaining compatible with surrounding base tiles.
